notes: Extended phase — continuing until 2026-05-30 12:00 CST. Iter321 avg 4.28: Q1 (4.56) Column rename detection in CDC — passed but lead-in overstated 'new column name never appears' and missed Iceberg native RENAME COLUMN as alternative; Q2 (4.00) Time-travel snapshot storage cost — passed but fabricated calendar-day cost formula understated overhead for heavy CoW updates, missed Trino-no-dry_run + rollback safety net. Fixed: resources/11 commit-rate-based snapshot overhead formula with 500GB/30d worked example (300% overhead), Trino remove_orphan_files no-dry_run warning, rollback_to_snapshot safety net, 7-day floor applies to BOTH procedures; resources/13 corrected column-rename framing (Debezium DOES emit new-named events post-RELATION-message; failures are downstream), added Iceberg native RENAME COLUMN as preferred metadata-only repair with ADD+backfill+DROP as alternative for dual-column transitions. Storage sizing: 4.447/7. Postgres-to-Iceberg: 4.492/113. Multi-tenant: 4.480/119.
